common_assumptions: File paths exist at expected locations without prior verification
Prior session state remains valid across context transitions and compactions
Tool availability (node, python3, npm, rg) without PATH confirmation
TypeScript compile success implies runtime feature correctness
Error root cause can be inferred from symptoms without targeted probing
strength_patterns: Systematic diagnostic sequencing with verbatim output capture on infrastructure and MCP issues
Verification gates before committing — tsc/svelte-check/npm-build runs confirm type correctness
Targeted multi-file reads before edits on unfamiliar codebases
weakness_patterns: Fixation loops on single files (30+ repeated edits to same target) without stepping back to diagnose root cause
Shallow alternative exploration — linear single-hypothesis execution dominates over branching
Assumption-first tool invocation without initial state re-read after context transitions or compactions
